label: General Utilities Package
description: Top 10 verified utilities skills, auto-curated by GitHub stars and security score.

skills.name: oh-my-opencode
skills.description: AI agent harness/plugin for OpenCode with multi-model orchestration, parallel background agents, LSP/AST tools, and built-in MCP servers.

skills.name: claude-mem
skills.description: Persistent memory compression system for Claude Code that captures tool usage, generates summaries, and injects context via lifecycle hooks.

skills.name: jumpserver
skills.description: Open-source Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform providing secure access to SSH, RDP, K8s, DB and RemoteApp endpoints via web browser.

skills.name: opentofu
skills.description: OpenTofu MCP Server for accessing the OpenTofu Registry

skills.name: Playwright MCP Server
skills.description: MCP server providing browser automation via Playwright accessibility snapshots, enabling LLMs to interact with web pages without screenshots.

skills.name: github-mcp-server
skills.description: GitHub's official MCP Server connecting AI tools to GitHub for repo management, issues, PRs, CI/CD, and code analysis via natural language.

skills.name: MaxKB
skills.description: Open-source platform for building enterprise-grade AI agents with RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, and MCP tool-use capabilities.

skills.name: planning-with-files
skills.description: Claude Code skill implementing Manus-style persistent markdown planning with task_plan.md, findings.md, and progress.md.

skills.name: Figma-Context-MCP
skills.description: MCP server providing Figma layout/design data to AI coding agents. Fetches, simplifies, and serves Figma file metadata via stdio or HTTP.

skills.name: fastapi_mcp
skills.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
